description: Optimize thermostat controller to minimize heating energy while maintaining 18-24 Celsius comfort zone in a 2-room building (30-minute OSP co-simulation).

OvenHeatTransfer.desc: Heater rated power [W] — lower is more energy efficient

T_heatStart.desc: Heating ON threshold — lower delays heating onset

T_heatStop.desc: Heating OFF threshold — wider deadband saves energy

k.desc: Inner wall thermal conductance — lower k = better inter-room insulation

k_outsidewall.desc: Outer wall 1 thermal conductance — lower k = better insulation
Outer wall 2 thermal conductance — lower k = better insulation
